Title: Relates to collection of social security account numbers for registration with the New York state donate life registry
Summary: Authorizes insurers to collect social security account numbers solely for the purpose of effectuating, verifying, or amending an individual's donor registration status in the New York state donate life registry; prohibits use of such information other than for such purposes.
LawCode: Amd §399-ddd, Gen Bus L; add §3114, amd §§3217-a & 4324, Ins L; amd §4408, Pub Health L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the general business law, the insurance law and the public health law, in relation to collection of social security account numbers for registration with the New York state donate life registry
